Heartbreak.text: The heart was made to be broken.
Heartbreak.author: Oscar Wilde

Heartbreak.text: Each man kills the thing he loves.
Heartbreak.author: Oscar Wilde

Heartbreak.text: When you are in love you cannot fall asleep because reality is better than your dreams.
Heartbreak.author: Oscar Wilde

Heartbreak.text: Some cause happiness wherever they go; others whenever they go.
Heartbreak.author: Oscar Wilde

Heartbreak.text: Some love too much, others not enough.
Heartbreak.author: Oscar Wilde

Healing.text: Where there is sorrow there is holy ground.
Healing.author: Oscar Wilde

Healing.text: To love oneself is the beginning of a lifelong romance.
Healing.author: Oscar Wilde

Healing.text: A man cannot be too careful in the choice of his enemies.
Healing.author: Oscar Wilde

Healing.text: We are all in the gutter, but some of us are looking at the stars.
Healing.author: Oscar Wilde

Healing.text: Keep love in your heart. A life without it is like a sunless garden when the flowers are dead.
Healing.author: Oscar Wilde

Self-Worth.text: To live is the rarest thing in the world. Most people exist, that is all.
Self-Worth.author: Oscar Wilde

Self-Worth.text: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
Self-Worth.author: Oscar Wilde

Self-Worth.text: I have the simplest tastes. I am always satisfied with the best.
Self-Worth.author: Oscar Wilde

Self-Worth.text: Selfishness is not living as one wishes to live, it is asking others to live as one wishes to live.
Self-Worth.author: Oscar Wilde

Letting Go.text: No man is rich enough to buy back his past.
Letting Go.author: Oscar Wilde

Letting Go.text: Some cause happiness wherever they go; others whenever they go.
Letting Go.author: Oscar Wilde

Letting Go.text: Experience is merely the name men give to their mistakes.
Letting Go.author: Oscar Wilde

Letting Go.text: The truth is rarely pure and never simple.
Letting Go.author: Oscar Wilde

Letting Go.text: Nothing that one ignores is ever wholly lost to one.
Letting Go.author: Oscar Wilde

Moving On.text: Every saint has a past, and every sinner has a future.
Moving On.author: Oscar Wilde

Moving On.text: The world is a stage, but the play is badly cast.
Moving On.author: Oscar Wilde

Moving On.text: The only way to get rid of temptation is to yield to it… I can resist everything except temptation.
Moving On.author: Oscar Wilde

Moving On.text: There is only one thing in the world worse than being talked about, and that is not being talked about.
Moving On.author: Oscar Wilde

Moving On.text: We live in an age when unnecessary things are our only necessities.
Moving On.author: Oscar Wilde
